target: 6. Date?
Lunchtime... it's already past that time.
Ah, this is the worst. I left the shop saying I'd be right back.
It'll be fine. Dad and Mio are used to being busy.
You know... You better apologize to Mio and Alain too, not just Totsumura-san, okay?

Why!?
I said I wouldn't help in the first place.
Besides, Shinpei, you finally came back to the island after so long, and all you're doing is helping out at Kofune?
It's fine, isn't it? I'm just doing what I want.
Helping out at the shop is what you want to do?
Is that so weird? I am studying cooking in Tokyo right now, after all.
That's true, but――
Hey Shinpei, Ushio!
Ah, Sou.
What are you two doing? On a date?
Da...!? No we're not, you idiot!!
Ow!? You didn't have to kick me!
Hmph!!
You okay, Sou?
A-Ah. Well, it's always like this. I'm used to it.
Haha, you guys were the same as always even while I was gone, huh.
Oh yeah, perfect timing. I have something I want to ask you, Shinpei.
Me? What?
How long are you staying here? It's summer vacation, so you're gonna relax for a while, right?
Ah, I'd like to do that, but because of my part-time job and stuff, I have to go back to Tokyo by the weekend.
Huuuuh!?
Hold on, Shinpei!! I haven't heard anything about that!!
You didn't tell Ushio? You stayed at her place yesterday, right?
Ah, well…
What were you thinking, Shinpei!?
I wasn't keeping it a secret. But Ushio was being so combative the whole time that I missed the chance to tell her...
Don't make excuses! You should say important things like that first!!
I-If you were that curious about it, you could have just asked me yourself, couldn't you?
Don't blame this on me! It's because you did something weird right after we reunited!
Something weird? What did you do?
N-No...! It's a misunderstanding, Sou!
…Hmph!
Hey, Ushio…
I'm going home! Don't follow me!
But I have to go back to the shop too――
Shinpei, you idiot! I told you not to follow me!
Ah…
She's gone.
Ah…
So, Shinpei... What exactly did you do to Ushio?
I didn't do anything weird! Nothing like what you're imagining happened at all!
Don't deny it so desperately…
Well, I guess so. It is you and Ushio, after all.
*Sigh*... I'm really tired. It's been nothing but this since yesterday.
(Just when I thought I could finally talk normally…)
Still, you're going back by the weekend, huh. Isn't that a bit too soon?
That might be true, but... I have my own circumstances.
I guess so, but to Ushio, it probably feels cold-hearted. I can kind of understand why she's mad.
Well, you're staying at Ushio's place again tonight, right? Feed her something good and get her in a better mood.
No, I was planning to go back to my parents' house after I finish helping out at the shop today.
Huh? Did you tell Ushio that?
If you didn't, she's going to snap at you again, you know?
...This might be bad.
I see... Well, I'll pray for your safety. Hope you make it back to Tokyo alive.
Please do...

Seriously, before you go back to Tokyo,
sort things out with Ushio.
If you part on bad terms, you'll regret it for years again. Thinking, 'I should've been honest with her'.
...Yeah.
(He's right... I don't want to have that kind of regret again.)
(I need to talk to Ushio as soon as possible...)
